title: Torrent
description: Torrent moves liquid placement and pickup to the client side, eliminating server delays for buttery-smooth bucket interactions. Experience instant, responsive fluid handling with virtually zero latency.
body:
**Torrent** is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft Java Edition that renders fluid placements instantly on your screen without waiting for server confirmation. This enhances **responsiveness** and reduces perceived **latency**. No server installation required.

**All server-side game rules and physics remain unaffected.** This is purely a visual enhancement that doesn't provide any unfair advantages beyond improved responsiveness. Check with individual server rules for whether this mod is allowed.


**Make every bucket count.**
